tools.name: get_weather
tools.description: Get current weather for a city

initial_messages.content: Find the weather in Hanoi, then based on that suggest an outfit.

raw_json.final_text_preview:
Perfect! Here's what I found:

**Weather in Hanoi:** 25°C and sunny ☀️

**Outfit Suggestion:** Light shirt and jeans

This is ideal weather - pleasantly warm with sunshine. A light shirt will keep you comfortable in the 25°C temperature, and jeans are perfect for this moderate weather. Don't forget

key_observations.context_accumulation: Append assistant content then user tool_result; same as OpenAI iteration loop.
key_observations.mixed_content: Assistant can have text + tool_use in same content array

mapping_to_current_system.equivalent_openai_param: Same loop: get response -> if function_calls execute and append -> repeat
differences: Anthropic: content array with tool_use; tool_result in user message.
mapping_to_current_system.conversion_needed: IterationRunner can use same loop; convert output items to/from Anthropic format.
